episodes.title: World's snarkiest lawyer Marc Randazza on fair use, free speech, youtube and cults  👀
episodes.description:
Yes we have the guy you want on your ide is someone is trying to shut you up. You may remember Marc Randazza from such cease and desist letters and the masterful response to Lauren Matthias' attack on Mr Breakfast (ie ""I mean, what even is this? Is this a mass mailing you just sent to everyone?"). We're pretty sure he has done other sterling work. But we liked that one a lot. 

Marc is joining us to share some interesting work he's been doing on a case involving on of our favourite topics - cults on youtube shutting down free speech over copyright strikes. How did he know we'd love that? 

Here's some background on the lawsuit: https://randazza.com/lawsuits/rapid-relief-team-v-cheryl-bawtinheimer/

Here's Marc's latest writing on the matter: https://x.com/marcorandazza/status/2049268286487990285?s=20

Here's our previous stream featuring Marc's response to Lauren Matthias' cease and desist letter: https://youtube.com/live/OHVyk333YbQ
